title: Financial Freedom (mission)
html:
Stub. Yahir's stated career-mission anchor — "help increase financial freedom throughout the world" (2023 01 30 eli internship). The concept ties crypto tooling to people in unstable monetary regimes / the unbanked. Pairs with the "excessively net positive person" life-mission framing.

Source summaries

  • 2019 03 14 voice memo 1625 — broker investing-101 conversation, the financial-freedom thread first surfaces in audio
  • 2023 01 30 eli internship — explicit career-mission articulation
